reason: Widget structure conventions (const constructors, prop ordering, build method shape, MD3 surfaces). Required for editing StitchControlsPanel/Sheet, adding the new auto-trim toggle row, and ensuring the new percent-based subtitle slider follows the existing _SliderRow pattern.

Riverpod state patterns — local vs notifier state. Required for the StitchEditorState field rename (subtitleBandHeight → subtitleBandHeightPercent), the new autoTrimBlackBars field, and the renamed controller setter setSubtitleBandHeightPercent.

WindowSizeClass dispatch convention — the toolbar scrolling fix only touches the compact/medium path (StitchControlsSheet); must not regress the expanded/large right-panel path that already wraps StitchControlsPanel in a SingleChildScrollView.

Lint + test conventions (const, single quotes, sort_child_properties_last, Timeline markers). Required for the new detect_letterbox usecase, the layout-with-insets unit tests, and the new widget test verifying the subtitle-mode toolbar (hides spacing slider, shows percent label, shows trim toggle).

Null safety + exhaustive enum dispatch. Required for migrating the subtitleBandHeight field (breaking copyWith / initial / fromState call sites must all be exhaustively updated) and for the new LetterboxInsets value type.
